title: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 28 2021
section_path: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 28 2021
section_path_text: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 28 2021
summary:
Main
Little change in the crude market from last week, although there have been rumors of some short-term period fixtures from oil majors as companiescontinue to stay away from longer periods due to ongoing market uncertainty. Limited fresh business to report in the clean market as the short-term outlook continues to look bleak. Oil prices have moved up to recover from last week's dip.
